seo.title: Infineon Distributor | BeiLuo Electronics
seo.description: BeiLuo is an authorized infineon distributor supplying MCU, IGBT, MOSFET and sensors with deep stock, 24-hour quotation and FAE technical support.

hero.headline: Your Trusted Infineon Distributor
hero.subText: BeiLuo provides authorized Infineon components including MCU, IGBT, MOSFET, and sensors with deep Infineon stock, same-day quotation, and dedicated FAE technical support for industrial and automotive engineers worldwide.

whyChooseUs.title: Deep Infineon Inventory
whyChooseUs.description: BeiLuo maintains over 10,000 Infineon part numbers in bonded warehouse stock, enabling fast fulfillment for production-scale orders with full lot traceability and certificate of conformance.

whyChooseUs.title: FAE Technical Support
whyChooseUs.description: Our field application engineers provide hands-on design review, component selection guidance, and reference code to accelerate your time to market with Infineon products.

whyChooseUs.title: Genuine Authorized Stock
whyChooseUs.description: Every Infineon component BeiLuo distributes is sourced directly through authorized channels with complete date-code documentation and anti-counterfeit verification.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Global Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: BeiLuo ships to customers in over 40 countries via DHL, FedEx, and UPS express, typically delivering within 3 to 5 business days after quotation confirmation.

productsTeaser.name: MCU
productsTeaser.summary: Infineon MCU portfolio including AURIX TC3xx automotive safety MCUs, XMC4000 industrial motor control MCUs, and PSoC 6 IoT devices - all in verified BeiLuo stock.

productsTeaser.name: IGBT
productsTeaser.summary: Infineon IGBT H3 and H4 trench-field-stop devices for solar inverters, UPS, and variable-frequency drives, stocked across TO-247, HSOF, and module package formats.

productsTeaser.name: MOSFET
productsTeaser.summary: Infineon MOSFET lineup spanning OptiMOS, CoolMOS, and StrongIRFET families from 20 V to 950 V for power conversion and motor drive applications.

productsTeaser.name: Sensors
productsTeaser.summary: Infineon Hall-effect, pressure, and current sensor families including TLE speed sensors, DPS310 barometric sensors, and XENSIV radar for automotive and industrial IoT.

solutionsTeaser.title: Motor Drive Solutions
solutionsTeaser.summary: Combine Infineon XMC4000 MCUs with H3 IGBT devices and gate driver ICs for high-efficiency three-phase inverter and servo drive designs supported by BeiLuo FAE review.

solutionsTeaser.title: EV Charging Infrastructure
solutionsTeaser.summary: BeiLuo supplies Infineon CoolMOS and IGBT components for AC and DC EV chargers, backed by FAE thermal design assistance and gate-drive circuit layout review.

solutionsTeaser.title: Industrial Automation
solutionsTeaser.summary: AURIX TC3xx safety MCUs and TLE Hall sensors from Infineon enable functional-safety-rated PLCs, conveyor monitoring, and robotic motion control platforms.

supportTeaser.title: How to Select the Right Infineon IGBT for Your Inverter Design
supportTeaser.summary: Step-by-step guide covering voltage class, switching frequency range, package selection, and thermal design for Infineon H3 and H4 IGBT families.

supportTeaser.title: Choosing Between Infineon AURIX and XMC MCUs for Industrial Applications
supportTeaser.summary: Comparison of AURIX TC3xx and XMC4000 series across safety certification, peripheral set, and development toolchain for industrial embedded designs.

supportTeaser.title: Infineon CoolMOS CFD2 in Totem-Pole Bridgeless PFC: Application Guide
supportTeaser.summary: Application note on gate-drive timing, dead-time selection, and PCB layout for CoolMOS CFD2 in high-efficiency PFC boost stages above 90 percent efficiency.

newsTeaser.title: BeiLuo Expands Infineon IGBT Stock Capacity for 2024 Production Season
Infineon AURIX TC3xx MCU Adoption Grows in Automotive Domain Controllers
BeiLuo Launches Enhanced FAE Support Program for Infineon Design Partners

finalCta.headline: Ready to Source Infineon Components?
finalCta.subText: Get a competitive quote from BeiLuo within 24 hours. Genuine Infineon stock, FAE support, and global delivery.
